summary_en: Dividend restoration to ¥10.57 per share for FY3/26 (record date 2026-03-31, payable 2026-06-29), approximately ¥27M total. Prior period FY3/25 paid ¥0.00. Forward policy: stable dividend floor of ¥10.57 per share independent of earnings fluctuations.
title_en: Notice regarding dividend payment (restoration of dividends)
translation_en_brief:
Fureasu Co., Ltd. announced the restoration of dividend payments on 2026-05-15. The company will pay ¥10.57 per share for fiscal year ending 2026-03-31 (record date 2026-03-31, effective payment date 2026-06-29), totaling approximately ¥27 million. The prior fiscal year (FY3/25) paid no dividend.

Management cited strong operating results driven by expansion of its core home-care massage business and operational efficiency gains, combined with favorable cash-flow forecasts and sufficient equity ratio and liquidity to support both growth investments and sustained dividend payments. The company established a forward dividend policy of a stable floor of ¥10.57 per share, independent of earnings fluctuations, to demonstrate commitment to shareholder returns while maintaining a balance between growth and capital returns.
